heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 5610 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this chapter, including to pay the United States contribution to the Organization as provided in Article IX of the Convention, $500,000 for each fiscal year through fiscal year 2021.
notes: Amendments2016— substituted “including to pay the United States contribution to the Organization as provided in Article IX of the Convention” for “including use for payment as the United States contribution to the Organization as provided in Article XVI of the Convention” and “2021” for “2012”.Pub. L. 114–3272007— substituted “2012” for “2006”.Pub. L. 109–4792002— substituted “2006” for “2001”.Pub. L. 107–3721998— substituted “for each fiscal year through fiscal year 2001” for “for each of the fiscal years 1995, 1996, 1997, and 1998”.Pub. L. 105–384
amendments: Amendments2016— substituted “including to pay the United States contribution to the Organization as provided in Article IX of the Convention” for “including use for payment as the United States contribution to the Organization as provided in Article XVI of the Convention” and “2021” for “2012”.Pub.
